title: Verify event tracking for all Trial Corner interactions
description: Test that all specified events fire correctly with proper attributes during user journey

steps.description: 1. Perform multiple Trial Corner interactions (view widget, click widget, view corner, click top content, set reminder, pause, cancel)

expected_result: All events fire with correct attributes: trial-corner-widget-viewed, trial-corner-widget-clicked, trial-corner-viewed, trial-corner-topcontent-viewed, trial-corner-topcontent-played, trial-corner-trending-viewed, trial-corner-trending-clicked, remind-me-clicked, pause-clicked, cancel-clicked
